chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الزِّيَارَةِ وَ الْغُسْلِ فِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 192 – The Ziyarah (visitation of the Kabah) and the washing with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/201)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/201)
text: يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُتَمَتِّعِ أَنْ يَزُورَ الْبَيْتَ يَوْمَ النَّحْرِ أَوْ مِنْ لَيْلَتِهِ وَ لَا يُؤَخِّرَ ذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘It is befitting for the performer of Tumatto that he should visit the House (Kabah) on the day of the sacrifice, or from that night of his, and he should not delay that’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is very proper that one for al-Tamattu‘ (advantageous) visits the House on the day of al-Nahr (slaughtering the offering, 10th of Dhu al- Hajjah) or during this night and must not delay. ‘“(Fatwa best explains Hadith 1-3 of this Chapter)
